seo.title: Arkansas Food & Wine Festival 2026 — Little Rock | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: The Arkansas Food & Wine Festival celebrates the state's culinary talent with tastings, chef demos, and a walk-around grand tasting at Riverfront Park.

description: The Arkansas Food & Wine Festival is the metro's premier upscale food event — a walk-around tasting evening where Arkansas's best chefs, winemakers, and craft producers set up stations across Riverfront Park for a three-hour grand tasting. Ticket holders graze through the evening, moving from a James Beard-nominated chef's bite to an Arkansas winery pour to a local distillery cocktail. The outdoor setting on the Arkansas River on a cool October evening makes the atmosphere as good as the food. Tickets sell out annually — buy in August to be safe.
